title: Shaqra Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Shaqra with a Z-Score of +4.51. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Shaqra is characterized by extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 14.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is very low at 15%, exacerbating the heat. 
 The wind speed is moderate at 13.5 km/h, providing little relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
